response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced full-stack engineer with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD) and some high-performance systems exposure, but he does not meet the core minimum qualifications for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ experience; his C++ work is limited to a short stint at National Instruments and a thesis project, with his systems work primarily in DLang and his recent career centered on TypeScript/Node.js web development. He also lacks demonstrated experience leading technical strategy for a cloud compute platform or formally mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at scale.
strengths: Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus community teaching and workshops
Broad technical range across backend, infrastructure (Kubernetes, Docker, AWS CDK), and open-source project ownership
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8 years of C++ experience; primary systems language is DLang
No production-level cloud compute platform architecture or large-scale distributed infrastructure ownership
Limited formal technical leadership — mentoring is informal (dojos, workshops) rather than leading cross-team strategy and delivery

key_factors.factor: High-performance systems and strong engineering practices
